lessons: Ran the test suite without first checking which test runner the repo uses; guessed jest, it was vitest.
Edited a shared util without checking its consumers and broke two call sites.
improvements: Add a note to CLAUDE.md: check package.json scripts before running tests.

lessons: Guessed the test command again instead of reading package.json scripts.
Spent three turns exploring files I had already read this session.
improvements: Surface a self-review checklist when many files are edited at once.

lessons: Modified a function signature without an impact check; a downstream import broke at runtime.
Re-read the same config file four times in one session.
improvements: Nudge an impact_check before editing a function that other files import.

lessons: Assumed the test runner was jest; it was vitest, third time this pattern appeared.
Changed an exported type and didn't trace who depended on it.
improvements: Document the per-repo test command discovery step in CLAUDE.md.

lessons: Forgot to check downstream consumers before renaming a module export.
Read a 1200-line file in full when a semantic summary would have sufficed.
improvements: Prefer semantic_lookup over reading large files in full.
